claim: This source kit is not a backend, security boundary, privacy program, legal review, model-safety system, complete accessibility solution, Stable release, or distribution-parity claim.

semantics.nativeBasis: aside conversation navigation, main workspace, public message list and native composer form
semantics.rolePolicy: Loading/offline/error states use persistent native status or alert semantics; streaming announcements remain opt-in.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through conversations, message actions, citations, tool disclosures, suggestions and composer controls in document order.
Submits from the recommended composer without intercepting IME composition.
Remain available in the message viewport; user scrolling suspends optional following.

nonColor: Conversation selection, delivery, offline, error, tool and citation states use text and native state in addition to restrained green/violet signals.
responsive: The sidebar becomes a horizontally scrollable navigation strip and main content stays single-column at narrow widths; touch targets, RTL and reduced motion are explicit.
adapterBoundary: All model, network, storage, upload, tool execution, authentication, authorization, moderation, retention and telemetry behavior is supplied by the consumer adapter. The deterministic adapter is local fixture data only.
consumerResponsibilities: Provide a secured, abort-aware adapter and keep provider credentials off the client.
Authorize conversations, messages, attachments, tools, retries, edits and branches at the backend.
Define privacy, retention, moderation, legal, safety and incident policies.
Run a complete product-level accessibility and assistive-technology review with localized real content.
